name: Insider Growth Management Platform API
what_it_does: AI-powered growth management and customer experience platform with REST API — enabling enterprise marketing teams to personalize customer journeys across web, app, email, SMS, push, and WhatsApp, with a built-in CDP, behavioral segmentation, predictive analytics, and A/B testing for omnichannel campaign orchestration.
use_cases: Personalizing web and app experiences via Insider API for individual customer journey optimization
Building omnichannel campaigns via Insider for coordinated email, SMS, push, WhatsApp messaging
Syncing customer behavioral data via Insider API for CDP enrichment and segment building
Automating lifecycle campaigns via Insider for e-commerce cart abandonment and retention
Running A/B tests via Insider for data-driven conversion rate optimization
not_for: Small businesses without dedicated marketing team and budget (Insider is enterprise pricing)
Simple email-only campaigns (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo for simpler email marketing)
Non-omnichannel use cases needing only one channel
best_when: An enterprise e-commerce, travel, or retail brand needs a unified omnichannel personalization platform — where Insider's CDP, AI predictions, and journey orchestration drive personalized experiences across 12+ channels with a unified customer view.
avoid_when: You're a small business, need simple email marketing, or don't have the budget for enterprise marketing technology.

auth.notes: API key authentication via X-PARTNER-NAME and X-REQUEST-TOKEN headers (partner-specific auth). Partner credentials from Insider dashboard. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for campaign and user event triggers. Mobile SDKs (iOS/Android) for in-app personalization. No public self-service API — requires enterprise Insider subscription.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise custom pricing; typically $1,000-10,000+/month based on MAU
pricing.notes: Turkish company (Istanbul). Founded 2012 by Hande Cilingir and Serhat Soyuerel. Raised $270M total funding. Series D $105M (Sequoia Southeast Asia, QIA 2022). Unicorn (>$1B valuation). G2 Leader multiple years. 1,200+ enterprise customers: Unilever, Samsung, Singapore Airlines, GAP, New Balance, Pizza Hut. 32+ countries. 11 channels: email, SMS, push, in-app, web, WhatsApp, Messenger, LINE, WeChat, on-site. AI features: NLP-powered audience segments, predictive churn, likelihood to purchase. Architect (journey builder), InStory (Stories), Sirius AI (ChatGPT-powered segments).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with partner-specific header auth (X-PARTNER-NAME + X-REQUEST-TOKEN). Mobile SDKs. Webhooks. GDPR/CCPA/SOC2. Enterprise subscription required. Turkish company. Annual contract. Documentation primarily for enterprise customers.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User profile reads idempotent by user ID. Campaign reads idempotent. Event tracking: use unique event IDs for deduplication. Profile updates: last-write-wins for most fields.
known_agent_gotchas: Non-standard auth: X-PARTNER-NAME + X-REQUEST-TOKEN headers — not standard Authorization Bearer
Enterprise subscription required — no self-service API access or free tier
Turkish company under GDPR (EU operations) and Turkish data protection law
11+ channel types each with different event schemas and SDK integrations
Mobile SDK required for in-app personalization — not purely API-driven for mobile
Annual contract with custom pricing — integration requires sales engagement first

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2 compliant. Partner-specific header auth. No OAuth2 scope granularity. Turkish company — Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK) + GDPR for EU operations. Customer behavioral data (PII) requires data processing agreement. EU/US/APAC data residency options. Annual enterprise contract includes data handling terms.
